'''Kiv Truun''' was the [[Darama|Viceroy]] of [[N'zoth]] when the [[Yevetha]] were conquered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Nil Spaar]] killed Kiv in the presence of [[Eri Palle]], and succeeded him as viceroy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{Mo}}
